title: Tulip Tweaks
description: A mod that adds a few cool tweaks
body:
## This Datapack adds some usefull, ballanced and vanilla frendly features.
Main changes:
- Revamps the early game progression to make use of copper instead of stone tools 
> - Wood > Copper > Iron...
> - Makes copper ore minable with a wooden pickaxe
- Adds a way to craft chainmail armor with iron nuggets and ingots
> - Leather > Chailmail > Iron...
- Replaces the gold powered rails with copper ones
- Adds a way to grind materials down to sand using the stonecutter
> -  Stone/Granite/Diorite... > Cobblestone/Cobbled Deepslate > Gravel x2 > Sand x2
